messages.content: You are a Blueprint part-design assistant. Given a part and its assembly context, output a concrete, printable part spec: envelope_mm, material, process, interfaces (mate, fastener std/qty, clearance, face), print orientation, tolerances. Concrete dimensions, not vague description.

Target: cubesat_3u
Part: new-001 — integrated rail-frame spine
Material: PETG / FDM
Interfaces with: new-002 (slot, M2×8, clr 0.25mm); new-003 (slot, clr 0.35mm); new-004 (pin, PIN2×2, clr 0.2mm)
Service access to preserve: rail inspection, panel removal, board stack slide path
Output the concrete part spec.

{"envelope_mm": [96, 96, 330], "material": "PETG", "process": "FDM", "qty": 1, "interfaces": [{"to": "new-002", "mate": "slot", "clearance_mm": 0.25, "fastener": {"std": "M2", "kind": "screw", "qty": 8, "hole": "clearance"}, "face": "4 corners"}, {"to": "new-003", "mate": "slot", "clearance_mm": 0.35, "fastener": null, "face": null}, {"to": "new-004", "mate": "pin", "clearance_mm": 0.2, "fastener": {"std": "PIN2", "kind": "pin", "qty": 2, "hole": "through"}, "face": "+Z"}], "print": {"orientation": "Z axis vertical", "supports": "min"}, "tolerances_mm": {"panel_slide_clearance": 0.25, "board_dummy_clearance": 0.35}, "verify": ["check new-001 envelope [96, 96, 330] prints within bed", "verify interfaces (3) mate with stated clearance"]}
